A STRONG EUROPE.
Within #NATO, France honours its commitments to collective defence:
- It provides a guarantee of stability to its Allies
- It invests in sovereign defence programmes
- It promotes the development of initiatives with its European partners https://t.co/AYPzRDsGJp

"My heartfelt thoughts go out to the victims of the terrible fires ravaging Spain and to their families. I wish to express France’s solidarity, as we too are battling the flames. I pay tribute to all the firefighters who have been mobilised." - @EmmanuelMacron
Reducing global imbalances, renewing international partnerships, advancing women’s and girls’ rights: this is the ambition driving France’s G7 presidency.
The GEAC focus this year: how demographic shifts are reshaping our societies, economies, and democracies. Guided by one compass: gender, equality, human rights and reproductive justice.

Women and girls’ rights are under serious threat around the world. France’s response renewing the Gender Equality Advisory Council (GEAC) under its @G7  Presidency: a clear signal for reaffirming its unwavering commitment to gender equality. https://t.co/3WCTzyuk0X

"More than 3,500 people have died, tens of thousands have disappeared, and families are in the streets. The 24 June earthquake devastated Venezuela.

France is taking action. Following our 85 emergency workers, a navy ship will deliver 44 tons of aid today, shipped from

"Racism is a tumour of the human soul, stupidity in the form of hatred. 

I note the condemnation by Paraguay’s authorities of the racist slurs a senator aimed at Kylian Mbappé. 

Our captain and our team have our full support. They are representing our colours: those of France."

"I am here to underline France’s commitment to the Syrian people. To a sovereign Syria, united in its diversity and at peace with its neighbours. Together, let us start a new chapter, of stability and peace." 
- @EmmanuelMacron

"Nothing will stifle the aspiration of the Syrian people to live in a fully sovereign, safe, pluralistic and united Syria.  This morning, I saw Syria’s full diversity in the people I met. I saw dignity, courage and determination." - @EmmanuelMacron
"Kylian Mbappé has scored again: against racism. He has my full support. Faced with dirty words, we answer with our values: dignity, respect and fraternity. @KMbappe" - @EmmanuelMacron
